    53	              >
    54	                Edit
    55	              </button>
    56	              <button

    59	              >

    62	            </div>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-12 15:03:21Z)**_

[MEDIUM] Eager loading of `DiffPage` increases initial bundle cost  
File: `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/App.tsx:9`  
Issue: `DiffPage` is statically imported, so `@shiro/rich-diff` and transitive code are loaded even when users never open the Diff tab. This is consistent with current large-chunk build warnings.  
Fix: Lazy-load the page (`React.lazy` + `Suspense`) or split by route/tab.

[MEDIUM] Missing regression tests for new page + renderer wiring changes  
File: `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/App.tsx:14`  
Issue: Hash routing behavior and renderer/style source changed, but no tests were added. Regressions (wrong hash fallback, missing renderer/plugin styles) may go unnoticed.  
Fix: Add tests for hash-to-page parsing/navigation and smoke tests for Editor/Nodes/Presets/Diff rendering.

[LOW] Duplicated hash validation logic  
File: `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/App.tsx:19`  
Issue: Valid page checks are duplicated in initialization and `hashchange` handling, increasing drift risk when tabs change again.  
Fix: Extract a single `parsePage(hash)` helper with one source of truth for valid pages.

[LOW] Coarse-grained renderer imports may reduce tree-shaking efficiency  
File: `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/EditorPage.tsx:3`  
Issue: Importing from `@shiro/rich-renderers` root can pull a broader export surface than needed.  
Fix: Prefer subpath imports (for example `@shiro/rich-renderers/tldraw`, `@shiro/rich-renderers/slash-menu`) where possible.

Verdict: WARNING
